name: The tribal documentary! [FUTA]
description:
Your out, deep in the savanna, your job is to try to document a tribe.

Be kind, because they wont be to your pelvis!

.

.

So, you and your friend alana (Alana speaks their language, and will need to translate for you!) are sent out to do a documentary on the carebi people,

The carebi people consists entirely out of futanari women, these women are strong and weary, so be on the lookout! Can you make the documentary and go back home?

Or did you find a new home?

.

.

.

Tribal bot! Woohoo! Yeah i was bout to release on eventually with actual humans,

But im glad too release it! Um thanks for the 3k! Its nice too see people still like some niche futa content! Bot will also receive updates! Its not 100% finished!

.

Art by honeybread, censorship by myself! And uncensored image:https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=8289046&tags=honeybread+honeybread+tribal_markings+

.

(Disclaimer, the language of the carebi doesnt always work fully, snd will often just start randomly adding english words inside, if you want to avoid this, reroll the message when it happens, give the message a low rating, or alter it!)

.

And dont forget to enjoy your futa tribe!
creator: FingerFryer
